revision.comment: スタブ
revision.text:
'''庚午'''（かのえうま、こうご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて7番目で、前は[[己巳]]、次は[[辛未]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（火剋金）である。
==庚午の年==
==庚午の日== ===[[選日]]=== 庚午の日は[[犯土|大土]]の1日目である。

'''庚午'''（かのえうま、こうご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて7番目で、前は[[己巳]]、次は[[辛未]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（火剋金）である。
==庚午の年== 明治三年五月十三日（[[1830年]][[7月3日]]）、徳島県で[[庚午事変]]があった。
==庚午の日== ===[[選日]]=== 庚午の日は[[犯土|大土]]の1日目である。 ===[[暦注下段]]=== *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]]
==その他== [[広島市]][[西区 (広島市)|西区]]には庚午という地区がある。

revision.text:
{{Otheruses|干支|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{干支}} '''庚午'''（かのえうま、こうきんのうま、こうご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。 干支の組み合わせの7番目で、前は[[己巳]]、次は[[辛未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（火剋金）である。 ==庚午の年== [[紀元後]]の場合、[[西暦]]年を60で割って10が余る年が庚午の[[年]]となる。
[[紀元前]]の場合、[[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が庚午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚午の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前951年]] *[[紀元前891年]] *[[紀元前831年]] *[[紀元前771年]] *[[紀元前711年]] *[[紀元前651年]] *[[紀元前591年]] *[[紀元前531年]] *[[紀元前471年]] *[[紀元前411年]] *[[紀元前351年]] *[[紀元前291年]] *[[紀元前231年]] *[[紀元前171年]] *[[紀元前111年]] *[[紀元前51年]] | *[[10年]] *[[70年]] *[[130年]] *[[190年]] *[[250年]] *[[310年]] *[[370年]] *[[430年]] *[[490年]] *[[550年]] *[[610年]] *[[670年]] *[[730年]] *[[790年]] *[[850年]] *[[910年]] *[[970年]] | *[[1030年]] *[[1090年]] *[[1150年]] *[[1210年]] *[[1270年]] *[[1330年]] *[[1390年]] *[[1450年]] *[[1510年]] *[[1570年]] *[[1630年]] *[[1690年]] *[[1750年]] *[[1810年]] *[[1870年]] *[[1930年]] *[[1990年]] | *[[2050年]] *[[2110年]] *[[2170年]] *[[2230年]] *[[2290年]] *[[2350年]] *[[2410年]] *[[2470年]] *[[2530年]] *[[2590年]] *[[2650年]] *[[2710年]] *[[2770年]] *[[2830年]] *[[2890年]] *[[2950年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生年。 *第38代[[天智天皇]]9(670)年 - [[庚午年籍]] *[[1870年]] - [[庚午事変]] ==庚午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[5月]]が庚午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==庚午の日== 庚午の日の[[選日]]・[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚午の日は[[犯土|大土]]の1日目である。 ===暦注下段=== *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]] ==その他== [[広島市]][[西区 (広島市)|西区]]には[[庚午 (広島市)|'''庚午'''（こうご）]]という地名がある。この地区が開発された年（[[1870年]]）の干支に由来するものである。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:庚午]]

[[紀元前]]の場合、[[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が庚午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚午の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前951年]] *[[紀元前891年]] *[[紀元前831年]] *[[紀元前771年]] *[[紀元前711年]] *[[紀元前651年]] *[[紀元前591年]] *[[紀元前531年]] *[[紀元前471年]] *[[紀元前411年]] *[[紀元前351年]] *[[紀元前291年]] *[[紀元前231年]] *[[紀元前171年]] *[[紀元前111年]] *[[紀元前51年]] | *[[10年]] *[[70年]] *[[130年]] *[[190年]] *[[250年]] *[[310年]] *[[370年]] *[[430年]] *[[490年]] *[[550年]] *[[610年]] *[[670年]] *[[730年]] *[[790年]] *[[850年]] *[[910年]] *[[970年]] | *[[1030年]] *[[1090年]] *[[1150年]] *[[1210年]] *[[1270年]] *[[1330年]] *[[1390年]] *[[1450年]] *[[1510年]] *[[1570年]] *[[1630年]] *[[1690年]] *[[1750年]] *[[1810年]] *[[1870年]] *[[1930年]] *[[1990年]] | *[[2050年]] *[[2110年]] *[[2170年]] *[[2230年]] *[[2290年]] *[[2350年]] *[[2410年]] *[[2470年]] *[[2530年]] *[[2590年]] *[[2650年]] *[[2710年]] *[[2770年]] *[[2830年]] *[[2890年]] *[[2950年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生年。 *第38代[[天智天皇]]9(670)年 - [[庚午年籍]] *[[1870年]] - [[庚午事変]] ==庚午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[5月]]が庚午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==庚午の日== 庚午の日の[[選日]]・[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚午の日は[[犯土|大土]]の1日目である。 ===暦注下段=== *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]] ==その他== [[広島市]][[西区 (広島市)|西区]]には[[庚午 (広島市)|'''庚午'''（こうご）]]という地名がある。この地区が開発された年（[[1870年]]）の干支に由来するものである。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:庚午]]

{{Otheruses|干支|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{干支}} '''庚午'''（かのえうま、こうきんのうま、こうご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。 干支の組み合わせの7番目で、前は[[己巳]]、次は[[辛未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（火剋金）である。 ==庚午の年== [[紀元後]]の場合、[[西暦]]年を60で割って10が余る年が庚午の[[年]]となる。
[[紀元前]]の場合、[[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が庚午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚午の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前951年]] *[[紀元前891年]] *[[紀元前831年]] *[[紀元前771年]] *[[紀元前711年]] *[[紀元前651年]] *[[紀元前591年]] *[[紀元前531年]] *[[紀元前471年]] *[[紀元前411年]] *[[紀元前351年]] *[[紀元前291年]] *[[紀元前231年]] *[[紀元前171年]] *[[紀元前111年]] *[[紀元前51年]] | *[[10年]] *[[70年]] *[[130年]] *[[190年]] *[[250年]] *[[310年]] *[[370年]] *[[430年]] *[[490年]] *[[550年]] *[[610年]] *[[670年]] *[[730年]] *[[790年]] *[[850年]] *[[910年]] *[[970年]] | *[[1030年]] *[[1090年]] *[[1150年]] *[[1210年]] *[[1270年]] *[[1330年]] *[[1390年]] *[[1450年]] *[[1510年]] *[[1570年]] *[[1630年]] *[[1690年]] *[[1750年]] *[[1810年]] *[[1870年]] *[[1930年]] *[[1990年]] | *[[2050年]] *[[2110年]] *[[2170年]] *[[2230年]] *[[2290年]] *[[2350年]] *[[2410年]] *[[2470年]] *[[2530年]] *[[2590年]] *[[2650年]] *[[2710年]] *[[2770年]] *[[2830年]] *[[2890年]] *[[2950年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生年。 *第38代[[天智天皇]]9(670)年 - [[庚午年籍]] *[[1870年]] - [[庚午事変]] ==庚午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[5月]]が庚午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==庚午の日== 庚午の日の[[選日]]・[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚午の日は[[犯土|大土]]の1日目である。 ===暦注下段=== *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]] ==その他== [[広島市]][[西区 (広島市)|西区]]には[[庚午 (広島市)|'''庚午'''（こうご）]]という地名がある。この地区が開発された年（[[1870年]]）の干支に由来するものである。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:庚午]]

[[紀元前]]の場合、[[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が庚午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚午の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前951年]] *[[紀元前891年]] *[[紀元前831年]] *[[紀元前771年]] *[[紀元前711年]] *[[紀元前651年]] *[[紀元前591年]] *[[紀元前531年]] *[[紀元前471年]] *[[紀元前411年]] *[[紀元前351年]] *[[紀元前291年]] *[[紀元前231年]] *[[紀元前171年]] *[[紀元前111年]] *[[紀元前51年]] | *[[10年]] *[[70年]] *[[130年]] *[[190年]] *[[250年]] *[[310年]] *[[370年]] *[[430年]] *[[490年]] *[[550年]] *[[610年]] *[[670年]] *[[730年]] *[[790年]] *[[850年]] *[[910年]] *[[970年]] | *[[1030年]] *[[1090年]] *[[1150年]] *[[1210年]] *[[1270年]] *[[1330年]] *[[1390年]] *[[1450年]] *[[1510年]] *[[1570年]] *[[1630年]] *[[1690年]] *[[1750年]] *[[1810年]] *[[1870年]] *[[1930年]] *[[1990年]] | *[[2050年]] *[[2110年]] *[[2170年]] *[[2230年]] *[[2290年]] *[[2350年]] *[[2410年]] *[[2470年]] *[[2530年]] *[[2590年]] *[[2650年]] *[[2710年]] *[[2770年]] *[[2830年]] *[[2890年]] *[[2950年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生年。 *第38代[[天智天皇]]9(670)年 - [[庚午年籍]] *[[1870年]] - [[庚午事変]] ==庚午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[5月]]が庚午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==庚午の日== 庚午の日の[[選日]]・[[暦注下段]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚午の日は[[犯土|大土]]の1日目である。 ===暦注下段=== *[[神吉日]] *[[大明日]] ==その他== [[広島市]][[西区 (広島市)|西区]]には[[庚午 (広島市)|'''庚午'''（こうご）]]という地名がある。この地区が開発された年（[[1870年]]）の干支に由来するものである。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:庚午]]

{{Otheruses|干支|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{干支}} '''Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Horse}][[Category:qq]] [[ja:庚午]]

It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Horse}][[Category:qq]] [[ja:庚午]]

For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Horse}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:庚午]]

revision.text:
{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Trimming off this bad category]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] revision.comment: Text replacement - "|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] pages]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]] revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] (astrologie)]][[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Metall-Pferdeen]][[en:Metal Horse]][[fr:Cheval de métalboishak]][[it:Kang-chṳ́id]][[sn:engwaja]][[ko:경오]][[nds:Metall-Pferdevi]][[vi:Canh revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:ang Metal Horse]] [[ja:庚午]][[zh:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[fr:Cheval de métal]][[de:Metall-Pferd]] [[af:Metaalperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Metall-Pferdeen]][[en:Metal Horse]][[fr:Cheval de métalboishak]][[it:Kang-chṳ́id]][[sn:engwaja]][[ko:경오]][[nds:Metall-Pferdevi]][[vi:Canh Ngọ]][[za:Gengceij]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-chá]][[zh-yue:庚午]][[zh:庚午]]

{{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * revision.comment: Text replacement - "|陰陽五行思想}}" to "|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:庚午]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:庚午]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:11]] [[ja:庚午]][[zh:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[fr:Cheval de métal]][[de:Metall-Pferd]][[Category:11]] [[ja:庚午]][[zh:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[fr:Cheval de [[ja:庚午]][[zh:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[fr:Cheval de métal]][[de:Metall-Pferd]][[Category:11]][[en:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yang Metal Horse]][[Category:11]] [[sn:ang Metal Horse]] [[ja:庚午]][[zh:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[fr:Cheval de métal]][[de:Metall-Pferd]] [[af:Metaalperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Metall-Pferdeen]][[en:Metal Horse]][[fr:Cheval de métalboishak]][[it:Kang-chṳ́id]][[sn:engwaja]][[ko:경오]][[nds:Metall-Pferdevi]][[vi:Canh restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches]] [[ja:庚午]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|己巳}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|辛未}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|火}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋}} (Fire overcomes Metal). == Kanoe-uma Years == For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[951 BC]] *[[891 BC]] *[[831 BC]] *[[771 BC]] *[[711 BC]] *[[651 BC]] *[[591 BC]] *[[531 BC]] *[[471 BC]] *[[411 BC]] *[[351 BC]] *[[291 BC]] *[[231 BC]] *[[171 BC]] *[[111 BC]] *[[51 BC]] | *[[10 AD]] *[[70 AD]] *[[130 AD]] *[[190 AD]] *[[250 AD]] *[[310 AD]] *[[370 AD]] *[[430 AD]] *[[490 AD]] *[[550 AD]] *[[610 AD]] *[[670 AD]] *[[730 AD]] *[[790 AD]] *[[850 AD]] *[[910 AD]] *[[970 AD]] | *[[1030 AD]] *[[1090 AD]] *[[1150 AD]] *[[1210 AD]] *[[1270 AD]] *[[1330 AD]] *[[1390 AD]] *[[1450 AD]] *[[1510 AD]] *[[1570 AD]] *[[1630 AD]] *[[1690 AD]] *[[1750 AD]] *[[1810 AD]] *[[1870 AD]] *[[1930 AD]] *[[1990 AD]] | *[[2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇}}, the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍}}, an important early census system in Japan under {{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}}. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変}}. == Kanoe-uma Months == In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|ja|小暑}}). == Kanoe-uma Days == === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In {{ill|Hiroshima|ja|広島市}}, the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed.== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]]
