It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=}} (Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 古代日本の戸籍制度}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062141]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Horse [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485994}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[zh-min-nan:Keng-chá]] [[zh-yue:庚午]] {{translated page|ja|庚午|qq=Yang Metal Horse|version=97212183|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[sn:Yang Metal Horse]] }} [[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Metall-Pferdevi]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062141]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Horse [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485994}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal [[af:Metaalperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ngū]][[de:Metall-Pferd]][[fr:Cheval de métal]][[hak:Kâng-ńg]][[ja:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[nds:Metall-Peerd]][[vi:Canh Ngọ]][[za:Gengngux]][[zh min nan:Keng-ngó͘]][[zh_yue:庚午]][[zh:庚午]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062141]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Horse [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485994}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[zh-min-nan:Keng-chá]] [[zh-yue:庚午]] {{translated page|ja|庚午|qq=Yang Metal Horse|version=97212183|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Metall-Pferdevi]] [[de:Yang Metal Horse]] For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|qq=|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|qq=|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years (Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * [[af:Metaalperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ngū]][[de:Metall-Pferd]][[fr:Cheval de métal]][[hak:Kâng-ńg]][[ja:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[nds:Metall-Peerd]][[vi:Canh Ngọ]][[za:Gengngux]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:庚午]][[zh:庚午]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062141]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Horse [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Horse|kanji=庚午|romaji=kanoe uma|onyomi=kōgo|p=gēngwǔ|w=keng-wu|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ u²¹|y=geng1 ng5|j=geng1 ng5|ci=kɪŋ ŋoː²|mc=kæŋ ŋoX|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋˤaʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Metal Horse also known as Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Tsuchinoe-mi|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|己巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe-mi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kanoto-hitsuji|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto-hitsuji|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Destructive cycle|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Destructive cycle|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485994}} was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[zh-min-nan:Keng-chá]] [[zh-yue:庚午]] {{translated page|ja|庚午|qq=Yang Metal Horse|version=97212183|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo district|ja|庚午 (広島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo district|1=Kōgo district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485994}} was named after the In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: kougo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ ==Years of Yang Metal Horse== For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Kanoe-uma Years''' |- ![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]] |- | *[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]] *[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]] *[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]] *[[:en:771 BC|771 BC]] *[[:en:711 BC|711 BC]] *[[:en:651 BC|651 BC]] *[[:en:591 BC|591 BC]] *[[:en:531 BC|531 BC]] *[[:en:471 BC|471 BC]] *[[:en:411 BC|411 BC]] *[[:en:351 BC|351 BC]] *[[:en:291 BC|291 BC]] *[[:en:231 BC|231 BC]] *[[:en:171 BC|171 BC]] *[[:en:111 BC|111 BC]] *[[:en:51 BC|51 BC]] | *[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]] *[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]] *[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]] *[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]] *[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]] *[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]] *[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]] *[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]] *[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]] *[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]] *[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]] *[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]] *[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]] *[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]] *[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]] *[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]] *[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]] | *[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]] *[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]] *[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]] *[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]] *[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]] *[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]] *[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]] *[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]] *[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]] *[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]] *[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]] *[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]] *[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]] *[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]] *[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]] *[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]] *[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]] | *[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]] *[[2110 AD]] *[[2170 AD]] *[[2230 AD]] *[[2290 AD]] *[[2350 AD]] *[[2410 AD]] *[[2470 AD]] *[[2530 AD]] *[[2590 AD]] *[[2650 AD]] *[[2710 AD]] *[[2770 AD]] *[[2830 AD]] *[[2890 AD]] *[[2950 AD]] |} === Notable Events === * Birth year of [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan. * Year 670 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on {{ill|Kōgo Nenjaku|ja|庚午年籍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Nenjaku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=古代日本の戸籍制度|1=koseki system in classical Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410913}}, an important early census system in Japan under [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]]. * Year 1870 AD - {{ill|Kōgo Incident|ja|庚午事変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgo Incident|1=Kōgo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11485995}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Horse== In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]). ==Days of Yang Metal Horse== === Special Calendar Significance === Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes: * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (First day of major land restriction periods) * {{ill|Shinkichi-nichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichi-nichi|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for shrine visits) * {{ill|Daimyō-nichi|ja|大明日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō-nichi|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (Auspicious day for general affairs) == Other Uses == In [[:en:Hiroshima|Hiroshima]], the {{ill|Kōgo
